title: Kth Largest Element
hints: Sorting the entire array is O(n log n). Can you find a faster way to isolate the top k elements without fully sorting?
Consider using a Min-Heap of size k. How does maintaining this heap help you track the k-th largest element efficiently?
Iterate through the array, adding elements to the Min-Heap. If the heap exceeds size k, remove the smallest element. The root is your answer.
